creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text: Building using the distutils method has been deprecated and finally removed with the 1.11.2; the new/current method is PEP-517 with the meson-python build backend. I have had a few scipy versions built successfully using PEP-517, including with the current openblas, but have not had a chance to verify runtime or test suite yet, particularly with mathematical correctness (since a couple build variables had to be removed).
